title: Senior Azure Cloud Platform Architect (m/w/d)
tailored_summary: Senior Azure Cloud Platform Architect (m/w/d)-focused engineer. DevSecOps and Cloud Engineer with 2 years of production experience on Azure and AKS. Skilled in Microsoft Azure, Kubernetes, Linux, NIST, Azure, Security. Built automation tools reducing manual ops work by 40-90% and MTTR by 40%. AZ-104 Certified.
